title: Creation Log used as a People column in Dashboards
excerpt: I would love the ability to use the creation log column as a people column in dashboards. Ideal would be able to choose if it would be a people or a date column, but I need a way to get a manager level view of how many t…

posts.author: Kristi.TD (Kristi TD)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love the ability to use the creation log column as a people column in dashboards. Ideal would be able to choose if it would be a people or a date column, but I need a way to get a manager level view of how many tickets each user is creating without having to set up an automation to assign users when an item is created.
